DFATools: detrended fluctuation analysis and related methods

Source: R/DFAmethods.R
DFATools-package.Rd

A toolbox of Detrended Fluctuation Analysis ('DFA') methods for long-range correlations, cross-correlations and regression in nonstationary time series. See vignette("DFATools") for the theory and worked examples.

Function groups

Scaling of a single series

dfa, plotdfa

Cross-correlation

rhodcca, plotrdcca, plotdcca

Partial cross-correlation

rhodpcca

Multiple cross-correlation

dmc2

Detrended fractal regression

betadfa, sbdfa, fracreg, effsizeDFA

Significance tests

fracreg.PStest, fracreg.Ktest, fracreg.IUTest

See also

Useful links:

  • https://github.com/Ikarobarreto/DFATools

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/Ikarobarreto/DFATools/issues
